<!--
Thanks for contributing to the Sites.Reviews MCP server!
Please fill in the sections below. Keep PRs focused — one logical change each.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123. If there's no issue, briefly explain the motivation. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation / examples
- [ ] 🧹 Chore / refactor / CI
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (would change tool behaviour or output shape)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes (TypeScript, strict mode, no errors).
- [ ] `npm test` passes.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` if behaviour changed.
- [ ] I updated the README / examples if the interface or install changed.
- [ ] The server stays **read-only and anonymous** (no writes, auth, secrets, or telemetry).
- [ ] Logs go to **stderr** only (stdout is reserved for the MCP protocol).

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything specific you'd like feedback on, screenshots, sample tool output, etc. -->
